problem.title: Pascal's Triangle
problem.description: Given an integer numRows, return the first numRows of Pascal's triangle.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Dynamic Programming
solutions.description: Build Pascal's triangle row by row: the first and last element of every row are 1, and every interior element is the sum of the two elements directly above it in the previous row. This bottom-up DP approach naturally expresses the binomial coefficient recurrence.
